prompt: Add an endpoint to my Express app that converts HTML to DOCX documents. I want to POST HTML and get back a downloadable .docx file.

assertions.name: helper-created
assertions.description: A helper/utility module was created that wraps HTMLtoDOCX

assertions.name: route-created
assertions.description: A route/handler file was created for the docx generation endpoint

assertions.name: content-disposition
assertions.description: Response sets Content-Disposition header for file download

assertions.name: route-wired
assertions.description: Main app file was modified to import and register the new route

assertions.name: uses-typescript
assertions.description: Generated files use .ts extension (tsconfig.json was detected)

assertions.name: no-env-vars
assertions.description: No .env file created with API keys (this library doesn't need them)
